user_id.description: Id of the user pre-selected as a default interviewer for this interview kit. References a `/v3/users` row. Only individual-user defaults appear here — defaults configured in the Greenhouse UI as interviewer groups or hiring-team roles are not returned by this endpoint.

interview_kit_id.description: Id of the interview kit this default-interviewer assignment belongs to. References a `/v3/interview_kits` row; the kit is tied to one stage on one job's interview plan, so this id transitively scopes the assignment to a specific job and stage.

description: Schema for the 'default_interviewers' stream, linked to the '/v3/default_interviewers' endpoint.
